form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a one length second (23.27) over 400m at The Gardens. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a one length second (23.27) over 400m at The Gardens. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on and lost considerable ground entering the first turn.
Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.
Checked exiting the turn into the home straight and was momentarily unbalanced.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (22.43) over 388m at Gosford. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (22.43) over 388m at Gosford. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 400m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.89) behind Lockdown in a Grade 5 on April 6. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last over 400m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.89) behind Lockdown in a Grade 5 on April 6. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recent effort finished 4th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 7 lengths (23.28) behind Ella Knows in a Grade 5 on April 18. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recent effort finished 4th over 400m at The Gardens beaten 7 lengths (23.28) behind Ella Knows in a Grade 5 on April 18. Should be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn tightened for room and lost ground momentarily.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 17 over 400m at The Gardens behind Magic Technique beaten 5 lengths (23.29). In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 17 over 400m at The Gardens behind Magic Technique beaten 5 lengths (23.29). In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the turn into the front straight and shifted out.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at The Gardens. Tested under these conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 400m at The Gardens. Tested under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the first turn, checked off heels, shifted outwards and came together.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Others preferred at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Others preferred at this stage.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on March 19 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Despicable Rambo beaten 2.75 lengths (17.70) in a Grade 4. Has a strong record from box 8, including two wins. Go close.
